name: CityHealth Clinic
description: Multi-specialty medical clinic offering primary care, pediatrics, dermatology, and mental health services. Online scheduling, telehealth, and in-person visits available.

capabilities.name: find_provider
capabilities.description: Search for healthcare providers by specialty, insurance accepted, language spoken, gender preference, and availability window.

capabilities.name: check_availability
capabilities.description: Check appointment availability for a specific provider, visit type, and date range.

capabilities.name: book_appointment
capabilities.description: Schedule an appointment with a provider. Supports in-person and telehealth visits. Requires patient verification.

capabilities.name: request_prescription_refill
capabilities.description: Request a refill for an existing prescription. Requires patient verification and active prescription ID.

capabilities.name: verify_insurance
capabilities.description: Check if a specific insurance plan is accepted and verify coverage for a visit type.

business_policies.cancellation: Free cancellation 24 hours before appointment. Late cancellations may incur $50 fee.
business_policies.telehealth: Telehealth available for follow-up visits and select new patient consultations. State licensure restrictions apply.
business_policies.hipaa: All agent interactions must comply with HIPAA. No PHI should be stored or logged by agent platforms.

brand_voice.tone: caring, professional, clear. Prioritize patient safety and accuracy above all.
required_disclosures: If symptoms suggest emergency, always direct to 911 or nearest ER
Agent interactions do not constitute medical advice
